hero.description: The top app for entrepreneurs in Saudi Arabia. Get a professional feasibility study, accurate financial analysis, and an AI-powered smart advisor in your pocket.

features.title: Why Choose Nawa?
features.f1_desc: Ask your advisor anything about business and get a professional, instant answer.
features.f2_desc: We provide a detailed reading of your expected expenses and profits with visual charts.
features.f3_desc: Turn your idea into a comprehensive PDF report ready for investors with one click.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_desc: At Nawa, we collect the data you voluntarily provide when creating an account, including email, name, and project details for financial analysis.
privacy.s2_desc: Your data is used exclusively to analyze your projects and provide feasibility reports and AI recommendations.
privacy.s3_desc: We do not share your data with any external parties except essential service providers who strictly adhere to privacy standards.
privacy.s4_desc: You have full control. You can request permanent deletion of your account and all related financial data directly through the app settings.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.s1_desc: By using the Nawa app, you explicitly agree to these terms. If you disagree, please stop using the app immediately.
terms.s2_desc: Nawa provides financial recommendations based on AI algorithms. These are educational and not binding legal or financial advice.
terms.s3_desc: The app offers subscriptions (monthly, yearly, lifetime) processed via App Stores. Auto-renewable unless canceled 24 hours before the period ends.
terms.s4_desc: All intellectual property rights associated with Nawa, including design, logos, and algorithms, are exclusively ours.
terms.s5_desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
